summary: Publication-grade Chapter 5: Discussion incorporating the new literature findings (Ploton et al. 2020, Wadoux et al. 2021, Forestry Commission 2026, Biney & Boakye 2023, Nyborg et al. 2022, Kondmann et al. 2022, Boiarskii 2019, Vizzari 2019, Segarra 2020, Strokal 2021, Amoah & Drechsel 2022).
